1:1	identifier	"package"
1:9	identifier	"grammar"
1:16	newline	"\n"
2:1	newline	"\n"
3:1	annotation	"@page"
3:7	identifier	"grammar.demo"
3:19	newline	"\n"
4:1	annotation	"@route"
4:8	string	"\"/demo/{slug}\""
4:22	newline	"\n"
5:1	annotation	"@layout"
5:9	identifier	"root"
5:13	comma	","
5:15	identifier	"demo"
5:19	newline	"\n"
6:1	annotation	"@render"
6:9	identifier	"action"
6:15	newline	"\n"
7:1	annotation	"@css"
7:6	identifier	"default"
7:14	identifier	"page"
7:19	identifier	"forms"
7:24	newline	"\n"
8:1	newline	"\n"
9:1	identifier	"paths"
9:7	lbrace	"{"
9:8	newline	"\n"
10:3	arrow	"=>"
10:6	lbrace	"{"
10:8	identifier	"slug"
10:12	colon	":"
10:14	string	"\"starter\""
10:24	rbrace	"}"
10:25	newline	"\n"
11:1	rbrace	"}"
11:2	newline	"\n"
12:1	newline	"\n"
13:1	identifier	"act"
13:5	identifier	"Submit"
13:12	identifier	"POST"
13:17	string	"\"/demo/{slug}\""
13:31	newline	"\n"
14:1	newline	"\n"
15:1	identifier	"view"
15:6	lbrace	"{"
15:7	newline	"\n"
16:3	text	"<main>"
16:9	newline	"\n"
17:5	text	"<h1"
17:9	text	".title>"
17:16	lbrace	"{"
17:17	identifier	"slug"
17:21	rbrace	"}"
17:22	text	"</h1>"
17:27	newline	"\n"
18:5	text	"<form"
18:11	identifier	"g"
18:12	colon	":"
18:13	identifier	"post"
18:17	text	"="
18:18	lbrace	"{"
18:19	identifier	"Submit"
18:25	rbrace	"}"
18:26	text	">"
18:27	newline	"\n"
19:7	text	"<button>Save</button>"
19:28	newline	"\n"
20:5	text	"</form>"
20:12	newline	"\n"
21:3	text	"</main>"
21:10	newline	"\n"
22:1	rbrace	"}"
22:2	newline	"\n"
23:1	eof	""
